'''鈭歾h-d-g''' ('''zhadaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knaa|knaa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knaa|knaa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-d-g
|-
! Lemma
| zhadaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadagithi|zhadagithi]] || [[word:zhadagiji|zhadagiji]] || [[word:zhadagishi|zhadagishi]] || [[word:zhadagi|zhadagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadaguthuth|zhadaguthuth]] || [[word:zhadagujuj|zhadagujuj]] || [[word:zhadagushush|zhadagushush]] || [[word:zhadag|zhadag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadaguthu|zhadaguthu]] || [[word:zhadaguju|zhadaguju]] || [[word:zhadagushu|zhadagushu]] || [[word:zhadagu|zhadagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadagufuth|zhadagufuth]] || [[word:zhadagufuj|zhadagufuj]] || [[word:zhadagufush|zhadagufush]] || [[word:zhadaguf|zhadaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadagethe|zhadagethe]] || [[word:zhadageje|zhadageje]] || [[word:zhadageshe|zhadageshe]] || [[word:zhadage|zhadage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadagothoth|zhadagothoth]] || [[word:zhadagojoj|zhadagojoj]] || [[word:zhadagoshosh|zhadagoshosh]] || [[word:zhadag|zhadag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadagotho|zhadagotho]] || [[word:zhadagojo|zhadagojo]] || [[word:zhadagosho|zhadagosho]] || [[word:zhadago|zhadago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadagofoth|zhadagofoth]] || [[word:zhadagofoj|zhadagofoj]] || [[word:zhadagofosh|zhadagofosh]] || [[word:zhadagof|zhadagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadag忙th忙|zhadag忙th忙]] || [[word:zhadag忙j忙|zhadag忙j忙]] || [[word:zhadag忙sh忙|zhadag忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhadag忙|zhadag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadagathath|zhadagathath]] || [[word:zhadagajaj|zhadagajaj]] || [[word:zhadagashash|zhadagashash]] || [[word:zhadag|zhadag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadagatha|zhadagatha]] || [[word:zhadagaja|zhadagaja]] || [[word:zhadagasha|zhadagasha]] || [[word:zhadaga|zhadaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadagafath|zhadagafath]] || [[word:zhadagafaj|zhadagafaj]] || [[word:zhadagafash|zhadagafash]] || [[word:zhadagaf|zhadagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhadagasha|zhadagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhadagasha|gozhadagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhadagasha|gokizhadagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhadagn眉sha|zhadagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhadagnkn眉sha|gozhadagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadagn眉sha|gokizhadagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhadagsh毛sha|zhadagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhadagnksh毛sha|gozhadagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhadagsh毛sha|gokizhadagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadagrosha|zhadagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadagnkrosha|gozhadagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadagrosha|gokizhadagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadagmusha|zhadagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadagnkmusha|gozhadagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadagmusha|gokizhadagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhadagsherasha|zhadagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhadagnksherasha|gozhadagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhadagsherasha|gokizhadagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhadagngasha|zhadagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhadagnkngasha|gozhadagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhadagngasha|gokizhadagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhadagyasha|zhadagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhadagnkyasha|gozhadagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhadagyasha|gokizhadagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhadagyamasha|zhadagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhadagnkyamasha|gozhadagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhadagyamasha|gokizhadagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadagn眉sh毛sha|zhadagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadagnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhadagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadagn眉sh毛sha|gokizhadagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadagn眉rosha|zhadagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadagnkn眉rosha|gozhadagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadagn眉rosha|gokizhadagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadagn眉musha|zhadagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadagnkn眉musha|gozhadagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadagn眉musha|gokizhadagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadagsh毛n眉sha|zhadagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadagnksh毛n眉sha|gozhadagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadagsh毛n眉sha|gokizhadagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadagsh毛rosha|zhadagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadagnksh毛rosha|gozhadagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadagsh毛rosha|gokizhadagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadagsh毛musha|zhadagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadagnksh毛musha|gozhadagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadagsh毛musha|gokizhadagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadagron眉sha|zhadagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadagnkron眉sha|gozhadagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadagron眉sha|gokizhadagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadagrosh毛sha|zhadagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadagnkrosh毛sha|gozhadagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadagrosh毛sha|gokizhadagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadagromusha|zhadagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadagnkromusha|gozhadagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadagromusha|gokizhadagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadagmun眉sha|zhadagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadagnkmun眉sha|gozhadagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadagmun眉sha|gokizhadagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadagmush毛sha|zhadagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadagnkmush毛sha|gozhadagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadagmush毛sha|gokizhadagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadagmurosha|zhadagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadagnkmurosha|gozhadagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadagmurosha|gokizhadagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhadag|zhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙d忙g|zh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhadag|hozhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙d忙g|hozh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhadag|hohozhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙d忙g|hohozh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhadag|n眉zhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙d忙g|n眉zh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhadag|n眉n眉zhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙d忙g|n眉n眉zh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhadag|n茂zhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙d忙g|n茂zh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhadag|n茂n茂zhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙d忙g|n茂n茂zh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhadag|luzhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙d忙g|luzh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhadag|luluzhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙d忙g|luluzh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhadag|lizhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙d忙g|lizh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhadag|lilizhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙d忙g|lilizh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhadag|kozhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙d忙g|kozh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhadag|kokozhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙d忙g|kokozh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhadag|kezhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙d忙g|kezh忙d忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhadag|kekezhadag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙d忙g|kekezh忙d忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
